reasoning: The control CM-3 (4) focuses on configuration change control with an emphasis on security and privacy representatives. The examples provided (e.g., deletion protection for cloud resources) are specific to cloud infrastructure services and do not have a direct equivalent in Kubernetes. Kubernetes does not inherently manage deletion protection for resources like load balancers or databases, as these are typically managed by the underlying cloud provider. Instead, Kubernetes focuses on configuration management through mechanisms like GitOps, admission controllers, and audit logging, which are not directly related to the deletion protection concept.
title: Configuration Change Control | Security and Privacy Representatives
